title: sanguisorba minor subsp. lateriflora
intro: Sanguisorba minor subsp. lateriflora, also known as red elder, is a flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Sanguisorba minor subsp. lateriflora include its ability to treat wounds, reduce bleeding, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
